title: HallmarkProvenance
description: Provenance record attached to AI-generated artifacts by Plan Forge tools.

schemaVersion.description: Version of this schema (must equal HALLMARK_SCHEMA_VERSION constant).

toolName.description: Identifier of the forge tool or agent that produced the artifact.

capturedAt.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when provenance was captured.

planRef.description: Relative path to the plan file (optional).

model.description: LLM model ID used to produce the artifact (optional).
